---
title: Laravel Cloud Envy
date: '2026-03-10'
number: 7
duration: '00:46:00'
audio_url: https://api.riverside.com/hosting-.mp3
summary: Colleen deploys her first Laravel app and gushes about how Rails has nothing
  like it, while Joe tallies up $250/month in hosting bills across three platforms.
  They also brainstorm a joint B2C app experiment, wrestle with Google Ads conversion
  tracking, and Joe shares his Ruby Native beta strategy as five client projects kick
  off at once.
---

<p>Colleen deploys her first Laravel app and gushes about how Rails has nothing like it, while Joe tallies up $250/month in hosting bills across three platforms. They also brainstorm a joint B2C app experiment, wrestle with Google Ads conversion tracking, and Joe shares his Ruby Native beta strategy as five client projects kick off at once.</p><p></p><p>Chapters</p><ul><li>00:00 Laravel Cloud?</li><li>21:46 Product Development Mindset and Consulting</li><li>33:32 Conference Talk Ideas and Strategy</li><li>42:38 OpenClaw Update and Browserless API</li></ul>
